temporal_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man in a black suit, a light blue collared shirt, and a striped tie. He has dark hair and a serious, determined expression as he speaks. In the background, a large, blurry map or diagram is visible on a wall, with some blue and red markings. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is present in the upper left corner of the frame. The camera remains steady, keeping the man as the central focus. A man speaks in a serious and authoritative tone, delivering his words with a steady, deliberate pace as if giving important instructions. His voice is firm and clear, conveying a sense of command and seriousness. "情报科的同事会负责追踪目标，监听，还有..." The camera cuts to a medium shot of two men standing side-by-side in what appears to be an office. The man on the left, with spiky dark hair, wears a dark jacket over a light-colored shirt and looks on with a concerned and focused expression. The man on the right, in a dark suit and a striped tie similar to the first man, looks forward with a stern, intense gaze. In the blurred background, other people and office furniture can be seen. The "风行网" watermark remains in the upper left corner. The shot is static, capturing the serious expressions of the two men.
